goal: Create a single-page hero section with fullscreen background video, glassmorphic navigation, and cinematic typography using React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + TypeScript + shadcn/ui.
progress: Analyzed user requirements for fonts, colors, layout, and animations.
Configured custom hsl CSS variables in index.css.
Fixed path aliases in typescript and tailwind.
Removed deprecated baseUrl to resolve TS config warning.
Created Nav and Hero components directly in App.tsx using requirements.
verification_path: Local preview using npm run dev. UI verified built securely.
